metadata.title: Aufwind AI — AI Automation for Local Businesses
metadata.description: Your AI assistant never sleeps, never calls in sick, and never misses a callback — built for dental practices, physiotherapists, law firms, and tradespeople.

hero.liveBadge: Over 150 local businesses trust Aufwind AI
hero.sub: Your AI assistant never sleeps, never calls in sick, and never misses a callback — built for dental practices, physiotherapists, law firms, and tradespeople.
bullets: Live in 5 business days — zero setup effort for you

liveActivities: Dr. Weber Dental just booked 3 new appointments
Müller Trades: New lead from Google
Kern Real Estate: Follow-up sent automatically
Hansen Physiotherapy: No-show prevented by reminder

problem.headline: Sound familiar?
problem.sub: Local businesses lose revenue every single day to these four problems — without even realizing it.

items.title: Missed call = €150 gone
items.description: Every 4th call goes unanswered. Average €150 per call — and that prospect is already calling your competitor. By the time you see your first patient, there are 3 voicemails and 2 missed calls waiting.

items.title: No-show = empty chair
items.description: 18% of your appointments simply don't show up. The slot is gone, the revenue is lost, and last-minute replacements are nearly impossible. That's an average of €800–2,000 in lost revenue per month.

items.title: No reviews despite great work
items.description: Only 5% of satisfied customers leave a review voluntarily. Your Google profile stagnates while your competitors grow. 47 messages in your inbox every morning — but not a single new review.

items.title: Customers who never come back
items.description: 62% of your existing customers haven't been back in 6+ months. They've forgotten you — not the other way around. That's €300 per customer you're leaving on the table.

modules.headline: 8 AI Modules. One System.
modules.sub: Every module solves a specific problem that costs you money every single day.

items.title: AI Chatbot 24/7
items.description: Answers customer inquiries in seconds — on your website, WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook. Automatically qualifies leads and books appointments directly.
items.painPoint: 62% of inquiries come outside business hours

items.title: AI Phone Assistant
items.description: Your virtual receptionist. Answers every call, handles questions, books appointments — even at 11pm or on weekends.
items.painPoint: Every missed call = avg. €150 in lost revenue

items.title: Smart Appointment Booking
items.description: Customers book online, via chat, or by phone. Automatic calendar sync, confirmations, and intelligent scheduling.
items.painPoint: Manual back-and-forth costs 5+ hours per week

items.title: Automated Follow-up
items.description: WhatsApp and email sequences that keep prospects warm. After 5 min, 1 hour, 1 day — until the appointment is booked. No lead ever falls through the cracks.
items.painPoint: 80% of leads need 3-5 touchpoints before booking

items.title: No-Show Killer
items.description: SMS and WhatsApp reminders 24h and 1h before the appointment. On cancellation: instant waitlist replacement instead of an empty slot.

items.title: Reputation Autopilot
items.description: After every appointment, a review request goes out automatically. Happy customers rate you on Google; unhappy ones reach out to you directly.
items.painPoint: Only 5% of satisfied customers leave a review voluntarily

items.title: Customer Reactivation
items.description: Automatically reach out to customers who haven't been in for 3, 6, or 12 months. Personalized messages with offers bring them back.
items.painPoint: Winning back existing customers costs 5x less

items.title: Social Media Autopilot
items.description: AI generates posts for Instagram, Facebook, and Google Business. Automatic updates like open slots, new reviews, or promotions.
items.painPoint: Consistent social presence drives 3x more inquiries

howItWorks.headlinePart2: Day 5: Your AI assistant is live.

steps.title: 45-min demo call
steps.description: We show you exactly how it looks for your industry. Free, no commitment, no preparation required on your end.

steps.title: Your booking URL + phone number
steps.description: Send us your existing booking URL and phone number. That's it. No IT project, no technical knowledge required.

steps.title: Day 5: Your system goes live
steps.description: We build everything. In 5 business days your AI assistant is active — without you ever having to open a dashboard.

howItWorks.guaranteeText: If you don't save at least 8 hours per week after 60 days — you get every cent back. No questions asked.

caseStudies.headline: This is what your results could look like.
caseStudies.sub: Projections based on industry averages and typical results from comparable businesses.

items.description: A 3-chair dental practice in Munich. A high no-show rate and a lack of online reviews were holding back growth.
items.quote: We never miss a call anymore. The AI phone assistant alone brought us 12 new patients in the first month — patients who would have gone to the competition.

items.description: A premium beauty studio in Hamburg. Regulars were visiting less, and new customers couldn't find them online.
items.quote: The customer reactivation module alone brings us €2,400 in additional revenue every month. Clients we'd completely forgotten about are coming back regularly.

items.description: A 12-person trades company in Stuttgart. Quotes were going cold and new client acquisition relied entirely on referrals.
items.quote: We used to miss 30% of our calls because we were on-site. Now the AI answers every call and books consultations directly.

comparison.sub: Compare for yourself — and decide what makes the most sense for your business.

pricing.headline: Transparent. Fair.
pricing.urgencyLabel: Save €{amount} — setup FREE when you book this week
pricing.guaranteeTitle: No surprises. Cancel monthly from month 3. No hidden fees.
pricing.guaranteeSub: 60-day money-back guarantee if it doesn't deliver.

items.question: What does it really cost — are there hidden fees?
items.answer: Pro is €697 per month plus a one-time €499 setup fee. That's it. No annual contract in the first month. No hidden onboarding charges. Cancel monthly from month 3. If it doesn't pay off within 60 days, we fully refund the first two months.

items.question: Does Aufwind AI work for small businesses?
items.answer: Our smallest customers have 2 employees and 80 patients per month. Our largest have 8 locations. No minimum revenue, no minimum size. If you're daily juggling appointments, clients, and callbacks — you're exactly who this is built for.

items.question: What if the system doesn't work?
items.answer: You don't need to configure, learn, or set up anything. Our team handles the complete setup in 5 business days. After day 5, your AI assistant runs independently — without you ever having to open a dashboard.

items.question: Is it GDPR compliant?
items.answer: All customer data is stored exclusively on German servers (Frankfurt). No data sharing with US services. No AI training on your customer data. A Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is included with every contract. For medical practices: fully compliant with §203 StGB and §22 BDSG.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Day 1: Demo call (45 min). You send us your existing booking URL. Day 5: Your system is live. No IT project, no weeks of waiting.

items.question: How quickly will I see results?
items.answer: From day 1. The moment your system goes live, you won't miss another call or message. Within the first 2–4 weeks, our customers typically see 25% more appointment bookings, 70% fewer no-shows, and their first automatically generated Google reviews.

items.question: Does this work for my industry?
items.answer: Our system works for all local service businesses: dentists, doctors, physiotherapists, hair salons, beauty studios, contractors, gyms, restaurants, real estate agencies, and more. We tailor every module to your specific business model.

items.question: How are you different from a regular marketing agency?
items.answer: An agency brings you leads — but who handles them? We automate everything AFTER the lead: call answering, appointment booking, reminders, follow-ups, reviews, and reactivation. 24/7, not just 9 to 5. At a fraction of agency costs.
